name: browser-render
description: Render a page with a full headless browser (Puppeteer on Cloudflare edge). Use when web-crawl is blocked or site needs JavaScript rendering, authentication, or anti-bot bypass. Supports text extraction, screenshots, HTML, and link discovery.

url.description: URL to render in the browser

action.description: What to extract from the page (default: text)

wait_for.description: CSS selector to wait for before extracting content
